title: aphragmus ohbana
intro: Aphragmus ohbana, also known as Aphragmus caudatus, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Brassicaceae. It is native to East Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Aphragmus ohbana is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
